title: Binary numbers
description:
Given a positive integer n, find the positions of all 1’s in its binary representation. The position of the least significant bit is 0.

Write a program that:

  • reads a positive integer n from the standard input,
  • computes the positions of 1’s in the binary representation of n,
  • writes the result to the standard output.
input: The first and only line of the input contains exactly one integer n, 1 ≤ n ≤ 106.
output: The output should contain increasing sequence of integers separated by single spaces — the positions of 1’s in the binary representation of the input number.
source: ICPC, Regionals, Europe, Central European Regional Contest, CERC 2002 연습 세션
